title: Haipicho 12 Sheets Christmas Wrapping Paper Set - 70x50cm Recycled Kraft Sheets with 10 Tags & 10m Twine - 6 Vintage Designs Eco Friendly Gift Wrap for Men Women Kids (Folded Flat)
features: ALL-IN-ONE WRAPPING SET: Includes 12 large sheets of kraft wrapping paper (70cm x 50cm per sheet), bundled with 10m of jute twine and 10 matching kraft gift tags. This complete kit provides everything needed to wrap gifts beautifully without buying extra accessories.

ECO-FRIENDLY & RECYCLABLE: Made from premium recycled brown kraft paper, this wrapping paper is biodegradable and 100% recyclable. An environmentally conscious alternative to foil or glitter paper, offering a sustainable choice for your Christmas.

6 RUSTIC VINTAGE DESIGNS: Features 6 nostalgic festive patterns (2 sheets of each) including Reindeers, Snowflakes, Christmas Trees, and 'HoHoHo' typography. The classic brown aesthetic creates a warm, traditional look under the tree, suitable for all ages.

HIGH QUALITY & EASY TO USE: The paper strikes the perfect balance between durability and flexibility. It is thick enough to not rip easily but easy to fold for crisp corners. The matte finish ensures sticky tape adheres securely compared to glossy papers.

FLAT FOLDED FOR STORAGE: Please Note: These are flat sheets, not a roll. Sheets are supplied folded (folded size: 35cm x 25cm) to reduce packaging waste and for easy storage in a drawer. Creases are minimal and blend naturally with the rustic kraft texture.
description: Make Your Gifts Stand Out with Haipicho Eco-Friendly Kraft Wrapping Paper Bring a touch of traditional rustic charm to your Christmas this year with our complete wrapping paper set. Designed for the eco-conscious shopper, this set combines vintage aesthetics with sustainable materials. Why Choose This Set? 1. Great Value Pack: You get 12 large sheets, plus tags and string. Enough to wrap multiple medium-to-large gifts. 2. 100% Recyclable: In the UK, many foil wrapping papers cannot be recycled. Our kraft paper passes the "scrunch test" and is fully recyclable. 3. Versatile Designs: From cute reindeer for kids to elegant snowflakes for adults, the 6 assorted designs cover all needs. Specification: Material: Recycled Kraft Paper Sheet Size: 70cm x 50cm (Approx. 27.5" x 19.5") Package Includes: - 12 x Wrapping Paper Sheets (Folded) - 10 x Kraft Gift Tags - 1 x Jute Twine (10 meters) KINDLY NOTE: The sheets are folded into 1/4 size for shipping. There will be fold creases, but these can be easily smoothed out or incorporated into your rustic wrapping style.
